privatechest.message.no_break_permission: You do not have permission to break this locker.
item.privatechest.owner_player_head.name: %s's Head
guide_lib.book.privatechest.desc: Crafting and usage for the private locker
guide_lib.privatechest.page.overview.p1:
Private Locker Chest adds an 81-slot locker
only the placer can open.
The top block shows an enlarged 3D render of the owner's skin head.
guide_lib.privatechest.page.overview.p2:
Use the table of contents for the locker recipe and usage.
See Getting the Guides for manual and Codex Tablet crafting.
Craft the Private Locker Manual from a book and a chest.
Right-click to open this guide directly
(not via the Codex list).

Craft the Codex Tablet from a written book, redstone, and glass pane.
Opens the tablet UI listing all mod guides
(requires guide_lib).
guide_lib.privatechest.page.locker.place:
[Placement] Two empty blocks must be above the bottom placement spot.
One item expands into the full three-block structure.
The placer is registered as the owner.
guide_lib.privatechest.page.locker.usage:
[Usage] Right-click the bottom or middle block
to open the 81-slot (9×9) GUI.
Five rows are visible; scroll the remaining four with the mouse wheel.
Non-owners cannot open it and receive a chat message.
guide_lib.privatechest.page.locker.break:
[Breaking] Breaking any part removes the entire structure.
Only the owner may break it.
Lockers are immune to explosion damage.
